title: ctenitis protensa var. dicksonioides
intro: Ctenitis protensa var. dicksonioides, also known as Dickson's ctenitis or the Dickson's fern, is a variety of fern that is native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against bacteria, viruses, and fungi. The health benefits of Ctenitis protensa var. dicksonioides include its potential to treat various ailments such as respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
